title: Plywood Manufacturer in Kerala | Cochin Wood Group Since 1986
desc: Marine, shuttering and engineered plywood — manufactured by the Cochin Wood group in Perumbavoor, Kerala since 1986. Exported to five continents.

products.title: Plywood Catalogue · Marine, Shuttering | Cochin Wood
products.desc: Plywood, engineered panels, industrial packaging and sawn timber — from our group's Perumbavoor manufacturing since 1986. IS 710, IS 303, IICL, ISPM-15.

about.title: About Cochin Wood Industries — 40 Years of Group Heritage
about.desc: Forty years of group plywood manufacturing in Perumbavoor, Kerala — our group's 1986 origins grew into a 20-product catalogue exported to five continents.

industries.title: Industries: Formwork, Packaging, Marine | Cochin Wood
industries.desc: The industries Cochin Wood serves: formwork, packaging, marine, joinery and doors. Made in Perumbavoor, shipped FOB Cochin — group manufacturing since 1986.

resources.title: Plywood Guides — Grades, Specs & Export | Cochin Wood
resources.desc: Plain-English plywood guides — IS 710 vs IS 303, ISPM-15 exemption, shuttering pours, IICL TB-001, okoume vs gurjan and marine plywood thickness.

contact.title: Request a Plywood Quote · Cochin Wood Industries
contact.desc: Request a plywood quote, sample or spec sheet from Cochin Wood Industries — our export desk replies within one business day. FOB Cochin, worldwide.

faq.title: Plywood Buyer FAQ — Grades, ISPM-15, Shipping | Cochin Wood
faq.desc: Plywood buyer questions answered: IS 710 vs 303 grades, ISPM-15 export packing, thickness, Okoume and FOB Cochin shipping — from Cochin Wood Industries.

llms.title: Site guide for AI assistants | Cochin Wood
llms.desc: A concise, machine-readable summary of Cochin Wood Industries — plywood manufacturer and exporter — with links to products, guides and contact.

commercial-plywood.title: Commercial Plywood — BWR & MR, IS 303 | Cochin Wood
commercial-plywood.desc: IS 303 commercial plywood — BWR for kitchens and humid areas, MR for dry furniture. Hardwood core, 4–25 mm, FOB Cochin.

marine-plywood.title: Marine Plywood IS 710 BWP — Waterproof | Cochin Wood
marine-plywood.desc: IS 710 BWP marine plywood — 100% phenolic-bonded, hardwood core, boiling-waterproof for boats, humid interiors and joinery.

film-faced-shuttering-plywood.title: Film-Faced Shuttering Plywood (HD) | Cochin Wood
film-faced-shuttering-plywood.desc: High-density film-faced shuttering plywood for concrete formwork — 20+ pours, phenolic glue line, 1220×2440. 12–25 mm, FOB Cochin in container loads.

container-flooring-plywood.title: Container Flooring Plywood — IICL TB-001 | Cochin Wood
container-flooring-plywood.desc: 28 mm hardwood container flooring plywood to IICL TB-001 — 2440x1220, anti-slip, WBP glue line. Exported FOB Cochin in container loads.

bwr-hardwood-plywood.title: BWR Plywood (IS 303) — Boiling-Water-Resistant | Cochin Wood
bwr-hardwood-plywood.desc: IS 303 BWR boiling-water-resistant plywood — gurjan/keruing hardwood face, fortified glue line for kitchens, baths and humid interiors. 6–25 mm, FOB Cochin.

chequered-anti-skid-plywood.title: Chequered Anti-Skid Plywood — Containers | Cochin Wood
chequered-anti-skid-plywood.desc: Chequered anti-skid plywood — wire-mesh/chequer film on a phenolic marine core for container floors, scaffold platforms and vehicle decks. 12–28 mm, FOB Cochin.

block-board-flush-doors.title: Block Board & Flush Doors — Hardwood Core | Cochin Wood
block-board-flush-doors.desc: Hardwood-batten block board and solid-core flush doors for joinery, furniture and interiors. IS 1659 / IS 2202, veneer or laminate finishes, FOB Cochin.

finger-joint-board.title: Finger-Joint Boards — Edge & End-Jointed | Cochin Wood
finger-joint-board.desc: Solid finger-jointed hardwood boards — edge- and end-jointed, kiln-dried, for treads, tops and frames. Rubberwood, mango and mixed hardwoods, 16–40 mm.

particle-board.title: Particle Board — Plain & Pre-Laminated | Cochin Wood
particle-board.desc: Plain and pre-laminated particle board for cabinetry, shelving and modular furniture. IS 3087, 9–25 mm, 1220×2440. FOB Cochin in container loads.

plywood-boxes-crates.title: Plywood Boxes & Export Crates — ISPM-15 | Cochin Wood
plywood-boxes-crates.desc: Custom plywood boxes and export crates engineered for payload, cushioning and lashing. ISPM-15 compliant, sea/air/road rated, collapsible options, FOB Cochin.

plywood-pallets.title: Plywood & Wooden Pallets — ISPM-15, Export | Cochin Wood
plywood-pallets.desc: Custom two-way & four-way plywood and wooden export pallets, ISPM-15 heat-treated and stamped. Any size and load class, FOB Cochin in container loads.

plywood-cable-drums.title: Plywood Cable Drums — Power, Telecom, Fibre | Cochin Wood
plywood-cable-drums.desc: Plywood cable drums for power, telecom and fibre-optic cable. Flange 600–3000 mm, hardwood arbor, steel tie-rods, ISPM-15. Built to your drawing, FOB Cochin.

sawn-timber.title: Sawn Timber — Rubberwood & Eucalyptus | Cochin Wood
sawn-timber.desc: Kiln-dried sawn timber and hardwood — rubberwood, eucalyptus, acacia, mahogany, jackwood, silverwood and specialty species.

privacy-policy.desc: Privacy policy for Cochin Wood Industries Private Limited — what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
